text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Taaaaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Even in a sweltering heat that seems like it would wilt the summer grass, the Horsegirls keep running. It happens on a certain day right in the middle of summer training camp.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Haah…! Haah…! Haaah…! 
Day after day of this heat… is really taking its toll…!
choice_data_list: <size=34>Yeah… Let's stay in the shade during our break—</size>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A brief sense of discomfort. 
At first, I thought it was because of the rising heat haze, but—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Hk!? …T-Trainer? …Are you okay? 
You were swaying just now, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My vision—sways.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Trainer! W-Wait, are you okay!? …Trainer!!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Umm, our stock of ice packs… Yeah, we still have some. 
Towels are fine too. And there's still a little time before the checkup, so—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ah… Trainer, you shouldn't sit up yet. 
Please stay lying down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems I was carried to the training camp's infirmary by Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi. My head is still a bit hazy.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: No, no, please don't worry about it. Though it's funny coming from me since I'm always the one collapsing, ehehe～

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
The doctor will be here later, just in case. 
Your symptoms seem relatively mild, but it's better to be safe.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ah, that's right, Trainer. 
Do you have any appetite?
choice_data_list: <size=38>I think I can eat a little</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Then let's have you eat a light meal right now. 
I made some rice gruel, so I'll go heat it up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I eat the rice gruel Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi made for me. 
Its appetizing aroma makes me forget I was even feeling sick, and I can't put my chopsticks down.
choice_data_list: <size=38>This is delicious… And it's really easy to eat</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: It's my special Tsuyoshi Egg Rice Gruel! The aroma of chicken stir-fried in sesame oil and green onions gives it a pretty nice touch, right?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I don't get sick all the time for nothing! 
I'm actually pretty good at making porridge-type dishes～

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I feel like maybe she shouldn't be so proud of that, but right now, eating takes priority over pointing that out.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Right, right, you have to eat when you can! Plus, you'll recover faster as long as you're eating properly.
choice_data_list: <size=38>It's delicious, so I'm naturally eating it all</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe♪ …Ah, let me know right away if you need anything. 
I'll support you perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I feel a strange sense of relief from Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi's smile. Trusting her words, I decide to rest my body for now.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I brought a fresh wet towel～ Also, the doctor said you should take it easy and rest for the rest of today just in case—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Oh, they're fast asleep. 
…A lot of fatigue must have built up.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Then what I can do for now is… Let's see. 
Ice packs, check. Wet towels, check. What else—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ah. There aren't any drinks left. I'm glad we're at the training camp. We have mountains of sports drinks, at least～

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Phew. I reported it to the academy too, so I think that settles things for now.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Things got a little hectic, but I'm glad it doesn't seem serious. I definitely panicked for a second when you collapsed…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Still… Phew. I guess all that's left is to keep an eye on you. Trainer… Yawn. I hope you get better, real soon～

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
…Hm? 
Ah… Come to think of it, there's a festival today, right…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I think they're having fireworks too… 
Yawn… You can see them beautifully from the hill…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for waiting, Trainer! 
Today, I'll be escorting you around the festival!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Mmmmm… Slowly, slowly, so the goldfish won't notice…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Haaah! Tap, tap, tap… 
Aah～ Don't run away～!?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Huh…? 
Because I… nursed you back to health…?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: You'll… rely on me from now on too…?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: When I wake up, it seems to be night already, as it's dark outside. But for some reason, I feel hesitant to sit up. That's because—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
…Zzz… Zzz. 
Mnya…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I feel like making a noise would wake up Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi, who is sleeping beside me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She must have done everything she could and exhausted her strength. I want to let my student, who nursed me so diligently, rest a little longer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, the sound of fireworks begins in the distance. 
Come to think of it, the second half of the summer festival is a fireworks show.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Mmm… Mmmm～? …Huh… Was I at the shrine…? 
The fireworks… are…?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Then… Was that a dream…? 
Haaaah… I'm so disappointed.
choice_data_list: <size=25>Were you having such a good dream that waking up depressed you?</size>
<size=25>Were you having such a good dream that waking up depressed you?</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ugh… I've been working so hard all summer 
to become someone who can help you…

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
And you finally, 
finally told me 『I'm relying on you』～!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
…But it was just a dream. 
Ugh, we even watched the fireworks together at the shrine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Watching Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi sulk, I can't help but burst out laughing. Her endlessly pure, comfortable feelings reach out to me.
choice_data_list: <size=30>If I already told you in a dream, is it okay if I say it again?</size>
<size=30>If I already told you in a dream, is it okay if I say it again?</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Wha…? …Does that mean…!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaaay—Ghak! Cough! Pfft!
choice_data_list: <size=32>Aaah, see what happens! Deep breaths, deep breaths!</size>

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Afterwards, in the training camp courtyard—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Do you think we can see them…?
choice_data_list: <size=25>I don't know if they'll be as good as the fireworks in your dream, but…</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Only hearing the sounds wouldn't be so bad. 
It'd make for a funny story— Ah…!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, we actually have a beautiful view. There are no crowds either, so this is definitely a premium seat.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Ah, another one went up…♪ 
Ah… It's so nice～
choice_data_list: <size=38>…I'm relying on you from now on, too</size>

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Huh… Yes.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
…Yes! I promise. 
I'll always… be someone you can rely on, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the two of us spent the time quietly watching the giant blooms in the night sky far away.
